name: Score Hub - Indoor Pickleball, Soccer & Golf
about: Score Hub is a multi-sport venue offering golf, pickleball, and soccer in a climate-controlled indoor facility. The facility features 3 premium golf simulators with advanced swing analysis technology, designed for year-round play and practice. Patrons can enjoy flexible booking options including pay-per-play and membership plans, with on-site food and beverage services available in a comfortable lounge setting.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced swing analysis technology for skill improvement
Year-round access to world-famous courses regardless of weather
Flexible booking options for both casual play and corporate events
On-site bar and lounge for socializing and post-game celebrations

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen serving pizzas, wings, and comfort food favorites
Full bar with craft beers on tap, handcrafted cocktails, and wine

simulator_hardware.notes: 3 premium golf simulators with advanced swing analysis technology (specific brand not mentioned)

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify whether club rentals are available, so it's recommended to bring your own clubs for your session.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, the venue has its own full bar and kitchen serving craft beers, cocktails, wine, pizzas, wings, and comfort food favorites.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify the time required to complete 18 holes, which would depend on the simulator software and number of players in your bay.

faq.question: Is this place kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Score Hub offers Kids Academy programs with professional coaching, comfortable viewing areas for parents, and birthday party packages. They also have flexible family-friendly booking policies.
